'''竏嘖-j-s''' ('''kasajas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberalise|liberalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberalise|liberalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖-j-s
|-
! Lemma
| kasajas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisajas|thisajas]] || [[word:jisajas|jisajas]] || [[word:shisajas|shisajas]] || [[word:kisajas|kisajas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusajas|thuthusajas]] || [[word:jujusajas|jujusajas]] || [[word:shushusajas|shushusajas]] || [[word:kukusajas|kukusajas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusajas|thusajas]] || [[word:jusajas|jusajas]] || [[word:shusajas|shusajas]] || [[word:kusajas|kusajas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusajas|thusajas]] || [[word:jusajas|jusajas]] || [[word:shusajas|shusajas]] || [[word:kusajas|kusajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesajas|thesajas]] || [[word:jesajas|jesajas]] || [[word:shesajas|shesajas]] || [[word:kesajas|kesajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosajas|thothosajas]] || [[word:jojosajas|jojosajas]] || [[word:shoshosajas|shoshosajas]] || [[word:kokosajas|kokosajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosajas|thosajas]] || [[word:josajas|josajas]] || [[word:shosajas|shosajas]] || [[word:kosajas|kosajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosajas|thosajas]] || [[word:josajas|josajas]] || [[word:shosajas|shosajas]] || [[word:kosajas|kosajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦsajas|thﾃｦsajas]] || [[word:jﾃｦsajas|jﾃｦsajas]] || [[word:shﾃｦsajas|shﾃｦsajas]] || [[word:kﾃｦsajas|kﾃｦsajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasajas|thathasajas]] || [[word:jajasajas|jajasajas]] || [[word:shashasajas|shashasajas]] || [[word:kakasajas|kakasajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasajas|thasajas]] || [[word:jasajas|jasajas]] || [[word:shasajas|shasajas]] || [[word:kasajas|kasajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasajas|thasajas]] || [[word:jasajas|jasajas]] || [[word:shasajas|shasajas]] || [[word:kasajas|kasajas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasajas|shasajas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasajas|goshasajas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasajas|gokishasajas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasajasnﾃｼ|shasajasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasajasnknﾃｼ|goshasajasnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajasnﾃｼ|gokishasajasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasajashﾃｫ|shasajashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasajasnkshﾃｫ|goshasajasnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasajashﾃｫ|gokishasajashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajasro|shasajasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajasnkro|goshasajasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajasro|gokishasajasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajasmu|shasajasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajasnkmu|goshasajasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajasmu|gokishasajasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasajasher|shasajasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasajasnksher|goshasajasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasajasher|gokishasajasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasajasng|shasajasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasajasnkng|goshasajasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasajasng|gokishasajasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasajasya|shasajasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasajasnkya|goshasajasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasajasya|gokishasajasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasajasyam|shasajasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasajasnkyam|goshasajasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasajasyam|gokishasajasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shasajasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshasajasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishasajasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajasnﾃｼro|shasajasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajasnknﾃｼro|goshasajasnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajasnﾃｼro|gokishasajasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajasnﾃｼmu|shasajasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajasnknﾃｼmu|goshasajasnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajasnﾃｼmu|gokishasajasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajashﾃｫnﾃｼ|shasajashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshasajasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajashﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishasajashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajashﾃｫro|shasajashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajasnkshﾃｫro|goshasajasnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajashﾃｫro|gokishasajashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajashﾃｫmu|shasajashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajasnkshﾃｫmu|goshasajasnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajashﾃｫmu|gokishasajashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajasronﾃｼ|shasajasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajasnkronﾃｼ|goshasajasnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajasronﾃｼ|gokishasajasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajasroshﾃｫ|shasajasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajasnkroshﾃｫ|goshasajasnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajasroshﾃｫ|gokishasajasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajasromu|shasajasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajasnkromu|goshasajasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajasromu|gokishasajasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajasmunﾃｼ|shasajasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajasnkmunﾃｼ|goshasajasnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajasmunﾃｼ|gokishasajasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajasmushﾃｫ|shasajasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajasnkmushﾃｫ|goshasajasnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajasmushﾃｫ|gokishasajasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajasmuro|shasajasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajasnkmuro|goshasajasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajasmuro|gokishasajasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
